title: Blueberry Butter Swim Biscuits 🫐 I’ve been seeing these all over my f...
description: Blueberry Butter Swim Biscuits 🫐 I’ve been seeing these all over my fyp so I had to see what the hype was about. These were definitely a 10/10 ✨ - - - Recipe  🫐 Ingredients (makes ~9 biscuits) 	•	Butter bath 	•	½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted   	•	Biscuit dough 	•	2½ cups all‑purpose flour 	•	1/2 cup granulated sugar 	•	1 Tablespoon baking powder (aluminum‑free preferred) 	•	½ teaspoon salt    	•	1¾ cups buttermilk (add a bit more if dough seems dry)   	•	1½ cups fresh or frozen blueberries   	•	Glaze (optional but recommended) 	•	1 cup powdered sugar 	•	2–3 Tablespoons milk   	1.	Preheat & prep Preheat oven to 450 °F (232 °C). Lightly grease a 9×9‑inch (or 8×8) baking dish. 	2.	Butter bath Melt ½ cup butter and pour it into the baking dish, swirling to coat the bottom  . 	3.	Mix dry ingredients In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt   . 	4.	Combine with buttermilk Pour in 1¾ cups buttermilk and stir until a sticky dough forms. Add a splash more buttermilk if needed  . 	5.	Fold in blueberries Gently mix in the blueberries to avoid bursting them   . 	6.	Bake Pour the dough over the melted butter in the dish. Spread gently. Use a knife to lightly score into 9 squares. Bake on the middle rack for 25–30 minutes. The tops should be golden and a toothpick should come out clean  . 	7.	Glaze & serve While the biscuits bake, whisk powdered sugar and milk until the desired drizzling consistency is reached  . Drizzle over warm biscuits, let cool slightly, then slice and serve. #fyp #biscuits #swimbiscuits #cooking #Recipe #recipeideas #EasyRecipe
